role: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the repo's top-level folder identity. Change a name HERE, in one place, and it flows through every tool/doc that resolves via lib/folder-registry.mjs.

model.id: Stable internal handle the fleet keys on — NEVER change once published (cross-repo contracts depend on it).
model.label: Human display name — change freely here; flows through everywhere. This is the 'rename in one place' knob.
model.path: Physical folder on disk. Changing this requires a git mv + (for fleet-coupled folders) sibling-repo coordination — so most renames should change LABEL only.
model.group: Conceptual grouping for the organized-root view (no physical nesting).

renamePolicy.labelOnly: Default. Want a folder to read as 'Build' or 'Delivery'? Change its label. No folder move, no fleet break. id/path stay stable.
renamePolicy.pathMove: Only when the folder has LOW fleet coupling (e.g. ops→operations). High-coupling module identities (pm, agile) must NOT move paths via find/replace — keep id/path, float the label.
renamePolicy.newId: Never rename an id in place. To retire one, add the new id with the old in `aliases` and migrate consumers through the resolver.

docs.label: Docs
docs.role: Narrative source — humans author what we are building

machine.label: Machine
machine.role: Machine-readable build of docs/ — compiled specs, canon, backlog, CI. Never hand-edit.
machine.shim: pm → machine (symlink) — back-compat so fleet ../fabric-os/pm/spec/* keeps resolving

agile.label: Delivery
agile.role: How we work — process: intake, planning, sprints, QA/UAT, roadmap lanes

operations.label: Operations
operations.role: P29 run register — compliance, security, gtm, machine-sync

deploy.label: Deploy
deploy.role: Deployment artifacts — docker, k8s, terraform, infra

agentic.label: Agentic
agentic.role: Agent runtime harness and fleet agentic tooling

workstream.label: Workstream
workstream.role: Live session state — sessions, sprints, status

agents.label: Agents
agents.role: Agent harness — bootstrap, capabilities, playbooks, manifest

platform.label: Platform
platform.role: Engineering layer — scripts, tools, mcp, assets

config.label: Config
config.role: Machine config — repo-kind, sor-map, governance-spine, folder registry

archive.label: Archive
archive.role: Cold storage — frozen bundles, provenance only

groups.build: The compiled machine build of source
groups.execution: How work is run and shipped
groups.system: Harness, evidence, tooling, config, cold storage — the operating substrate
